title: Final review of epic o16 diff
description: Meta-work tick (orchestrator-owned). Review the full diff of epic o16 (soft-edge rendering in tk roadmap CLI/TUI/web board + skill doc updates) against its base. Focus: (1) Go/TS roadmap compute parity — the five table cases must assert identical wave/status/after results in roadmap_test.go and roadmap-compute.test.ts; (2) visual hierarchy — after annotations/badges must read weaker than blocked-by in all three surfaces; (3) skill docs internal consistency — no remaining guidance that conflates preference with dependency; (4) embedded assets actually regenerated if the UI bundle changed. Run a reviewer subagent per references/claude-runner.md.
acceptance_criteria: epic diff reviewed; all blocker-severity findings resolved or routed as ticks before close-out unblocks
